headline: Copart (CPRT) Could Be 45% Below Fair Value On Its Slower Growth Narrative
summary: Copart (CPRT) is back in focus after Liquidity Services was highlighted as a potential acquisition target, with Copart mentioned as a possible buyer of the online surplus and salvage marketplace. See our latest analysis for Copart. At a share price of $27.17, Copart has seen its 30 day share price return fall about 8% and its year to date share price return decline around 28%, while the 1 year total shareholder return is down about 42%. This suggests recent enthusiasm has cooled despite...

headline: Copart (CPRT) Stock Looks Undervalued With Shares Down 42%
summary: Copart stock has had a tough run, with the share price under pressure over the past year, yet the valuation checks and the Discounted Cash Flow (DCF) intrinsic value estimate both point to the shares screening as undervalued today. Over the last 12 months, Copart has fallen 42%, which means expectations embedded in the share price have come down sharply. The long term model of recurring auction volumes and cash generation can support an undervalued thesis. However, any slowdown in salvage...
